title: Feature Spec
description: A single feature, decomposed by layer. Composes the layer schemas via $ref under frontend/backend/database/contract. A repo's per-feature schema (specs/features/<f>/schema.json) extends THIS via allOf and may pin feature_id and add feature-specific constraints. The instance this validates is the feature's feature.json.

feature_owner.description: The person, team, or role accountable for this feature's intent.

business_process.description: The real-world or technical process this feature serves, written in human-readable language.

data_classification.description: Optional per-feature override of the repo default (root.schema.json).

layers.description: Which layers this feature touches. Each listed layer SHOULD have a matching block below.

component_ids.description: Component IDs from components.md this feature realizes. Format <DOMAIN>-<AREA>-NNN, e.g. SALES-ACCT-001.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable criteria. Mirrors AgenticFlow's Requirement model (REQ-id + coverage). Write these in human-readable language; coverage tells the harness HOW each is checked.

evidence_required.description: Evidence kinds that must be satisfied before this feature's work is 'done', e.g. 'typecheck','tests','erd-parity','endpoint-parity','e2e','screenshot'.

open_questions.description: Unresolved decisions blocking or shaping the feature.
